title: Retail Supervisor
description:
Please note that all positions must be applied for through the portal; applications sent via direct email will not be considered for shortlisting.


Manage all Frontline Staff assigned

  • Be a Leader to motivate and guide team members in becoming true Shilla Ambassadors
  • Assist Retail Manager / Senior Retail Manager on recruitment needs
  • Drive sales and work on sales initiatives to maximize sales potentials to achieve sales targets
  • Handle all employee disciplinary matters, provide counselling and enforce disciplinary actions
  • Ensure compliance of SOPs of selling standards, customer service quality and attitudes, grooming matters and adherence to all established operational policies and procedures
  • Handle rostering and manpower planning

Sales Reports and Targets

  • Prepare all required sales reports and forecasting for assigned terminal
  • Customer Service
  • Work closely with Customer Service Team to manage and resolve customer-related feedback

Store Management

  • Conduct stock take exercises, monitor stocks, manage inventory levels and replenishment
  • Ensure sufficient stocks of products and other requirement items
  • Work closely with related Departments to review Visual Merchandising and product display
  • Ensure all Incidents in store are duly reported and handled
  • Work with Security Team on STEB & LAGS regulations
  • Any other duties as per assigned

KEY REQUIREMENTS & COMPETENCIES

  • Minimum GCE ‘O’ Level
  • Prior experience in Cosmetic and Perfume sales in a Supervisory capacity, with passion in the industry
  • Experience in travel retail background preferred
  • Excellent communication and interpersonal skills
  • Strong customer service mentality, proactive and willing to learn attitude
  • Dependable Leader with the proven sales records
  • Bilingual, with the ability to speak third language an added advantage
  • Able to perform retail operational hours, including weekends and public holidays
  • Bilingual, with the ability to speak third language an added advantage

postedCompany.description:
Shilla Duty Free, an affiliate of Samsung Group is a leading global travel retailer offering quality merchandise from over 600 world-famous brands in fashion, jewelry, cosmetics, perfumes and watches etc.


The Shilla Duty Free is the largest cosmetics & perfumes duty free retailer in Incheon International Airport, and the company strives to expand the global business to serve customers in Asia.

 

The Shilla Duty Free is the top beauty destination at Changi Airport with 23 Cosmetics and Perfumes stores across the four terminals including Shilla Beauty Loft, the world’s first duty free beauty services loft. The Shilla Duty Free also operates two watch boutiques, Maison de Chronus as well as Victoria’s Secret stores at Terminal 2 and Terminal 3.

 

We are rapidly expanding our presence in travel retail!
postedCompany.name: SHILLA TRAVEL RETAIL PTE. LTD.
